# .github Documentation Index

- `copilot-instructions.md`: Workspace instructions for Copilot.
- `CHANGELOG.md`: Project change history.
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`: Contribution workflow.
- `ISSUES.md`: Issue reporting guidelines.
- `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`: Pull request checklist.
- `SECURITY.md`: Vulnerability reporting and policy.
- `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`: Community behavior standards.
- `SUPPORT.md`: Support guidance.

## AI Customization

- `AGENTS.md` and `agents/ENGINEERING.md` / `agents/TESTING.md` are the shared source of truth.
- Tool-specific folders such as `.cursor/`, `.claude/`, `.gemini/`, and `.antigravity/` are compatibility layers only.
- Keep those tool folders thin JSON compatibility files; avoid copying the same policy text into each one.
